Who I Am

About Me

I'm Thalluru Lakshmi Prasanna, a B.Tech CSE (AI & ML) student at Manav Rachna University, Faridabad. My academic journey is driven by a deep curiosity for Artificial Intelligence and its real-world applications.

I specialize in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Computer Vision â€” building projects that solve meaningful problems. From detecting food freshness to identifying cattle breeds, I love turning research ideas into working systems.

I've participated in national-level hackathons like Smart India Hackathon and Google Hackathon, and I'm always looking for opportunities to collaborate, learn, and grow.

What I've Built

Projects

Food Freshness Detection Using Machine Learning

Developed an intelligent food freshness detection system using deep learning (MobileNetV2, AlexNet, ResNet50, etc.) and clustering techniques on a balanced 2,600-image dataset to accurately classify fruits and vegetables into multiple freshness levels for smart refrigerator applications.

MobileNetV2ResNet50AlexNetDeep LearningComputer Vision
View on GitHub

Breed Recognition Of Cattle and Buffaloes

Developed a deep-learning-based cattle breed recognition system using CNN feature extractors and LSTM modeling to accurately classify 37 indigenous breeds and predict short-term milk traits.

CNNLSTMDeep LearningTransfer Learning
View on GitHub

Two-Stage Deep Learning Framework for ASD Detection and Emotion Recognition

Developed a two-stage deep learning framework for Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) detection and facial emotion recognition using image-based analysis, integrating CNN architectures and transformer-based models for accurate and efficient prediction.

CNNTransformersASD DetectionEmotion AI
View on GitHub

Thyroid Disease Prediction Using Machine Learning

Developed a high-accuracy machine learning model (98.05%) using advanced preprocessing, SMOTE balancing, and ensemble techniques to predict thyroid cancer recurrence.

SMOTEEnsemble MLHealthcare AI98.05% Accuracy
View on GitHub
